title: Pathlib, Content Discovery, Roots, Symlinks, and Admission · Code Recall
summary: A delayed publication review reconstructs pathlib, content discovery, roots, symlinks, and admission from revision, configuration, source bytes, document nodes, route manifest, rendered HTML, asset graph, validation report, artifact digest, deployment, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded content-discovery manifest after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence…
objectives: Use Path and PurePath operations with explicit platform, resolution, relative, and I/O semantics instead of string slicing.
Declare roots, extensions, ignores, hidden files, drafts, ordering, maximum files, depth, and total bytes before traversal.
Admit or reject symlinks using resolved ancestry, cycle handling, file type, and ownership policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record stable source identity, relative path, size, digest purpose, route candidate, status, and rejection reason. Artifact under review: bounded content-discovery manifest.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

For separate evidence from confidence, render one trusted short page at the root, omit content authority, source spans, parser limits, route base, URL and asset reconciliation, contextual encoding, accessibility, clean-build comparison, deployment, rollback, recovery, and production transfer, then accept plausible HTML as publication proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Discovery Manifest, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Discovery Manifest
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Discovery Manifest: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review publishing team handles case 6181 during a project-subpath GitHub Pages deployment. Build deterministic Python evidence to build a bounded content manifest with explicit rejection, root, and collision evidence; record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, reader task, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then zoom a translated long-form page to 400 percent at mobile width with images and code blocks. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Record stable source identity, relative path, size, digest purpose, route candidate, status, and rejection reason.

Evidence target: Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Discovery Manifest.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Discovery Manifest, keep Discovery Manifest connected to executable Python source, parse, route, render, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Record stable source identity, relative path, size, digest purpose, route candidate, status, and rejection reason.

hints: For Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Discovery Manifest, name the reader, content authority, revision, source, span, parser, trust, route, render, asset, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery boundary, Discovery Manifest precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Discovery Manifest, trace this concrete input and predict admission, decoding, tokenization, parsing, transformation, routing, rendering, validation, publication, failure, rollback, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A review publishing team handles case 6181 during a project-subpath GitHub Pages deployment. Build deterministic Python evidence to build a bounded content manifest with explicit rejection, root, and collision evidence; record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, reader task, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then zoom a translated long-form page to 400 percent at mobile width with images and code blocks. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Record stable source identity, relative path, size, digest purpose, route candidate, status, and rejection reason.

For Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Discovery Manifest, challenge the documented misconception with changed-source, delimiter, Unicode, nesting, route, URL, asset, viewport, cache, security, deployment, recovery, and controlled production-transfer evidence: The list of rendered pages is enough to reproduce discovery.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.
